kept.text:
@PolitiBunny When you have a dead body you can't really not report it but you can play with definitions. For example saying homicide instead of murder/manslaughter since homicide includes suicide which is generally much more common and skews statistics. You can also list a death where no perpetrator is found as death by unknown cause. The cause of more than half of violent deaths are never found. 
IDK if that's the case here but that's how it's done.
